name: Jellyfin Signup
description: Invite-based public signup, email verification, and password reset for Jellyfin.
overview: Adds a Jellyfin-branded public signup page with invite controls and an admin dashboard configuration page.

versions.changelog: Hardens the login-page runtime patch so it uses plain button creation, shows a signup button by default, retries patching after Jellyfin re-renders the login form, and registers a fresh File Transformation callback ID.
